March 2026 — Vol. 02

Open Court
× SoTA

A curated gathering at the intersection of build culture and scientific optimism. This month we share a room with the Society for Technological Advancement — exploring what it means to build with conviction in an age of accelerating capability.

Date March 2026 — TBC
Time 18.30 – 21.00
Location London — Venue TBC
Partner Society for Technological Advancement

Before you arrive

Pre-
reading

01
The bitter lesson — Richard Sutton

The most important essay in AI. A sharp argument that general methods which leverage computation always win. Required reading before any conversation about agents.

 02
Agents — Lilian Weng

The clearest technical overview of what LLM-powered agents actually are — memory, planning, tool use. Dense but worth it.

 03
How Spotify's discovery engine works

Context for our first speaker session. Understanding how Spotify thinks about taste, behaviour and recommendation at scale.
